title: Ansell HyFlex 48-100 Thin Work Gloves, Stretch Fit Nylon Liner with Flexible PU Coating, Lightweight Safety Gloves for Precision Handling, DIY and Mechanics, White, Size XL (12 Pairs)
features: ANSELL HYFLEX 48-100 Protective gloves offer outstanding tactility, dexterity and comfort for delicate handling where precision is required
POLYURETHANE COATING - provides workers high abrasion resistance. This working glove will be the perfect product for safety, automotive or mechanical uses
HEIGHTENED TACTILITY - perfect balance between dexterity and sensitivity for intricate applications, with thin PU coating for added protection

AVAILABLE IN DIFFERENT SIZES and COLORS - Engineered fit to allow optimum balance of fit and flexibility, this glove is available in white, grey or black and in multiple sizes, S, M, L and XL sizes. Gloves come in multipacks 12 pairs
As the WORLD'S BEST-SELLING PRECISION ASSEMBLY GLOVE, HYFLEX enables MILLIONS OF WOMEN AND MEN to do their job more effectively, more comfortably and more safely on a daily basis
